# Generated by pip-compile from tests/requirements.in
# Run `make compile-deps` to regenerate after editing requirements.in.
#
# Deliberately NOT using pytest-homeassistant-custom-component: it pulls in a
# large dependency tree pinned to a specific HA release. Instead, tests import
# real entity base classes from a plain homeassistant install with small fakes
# for hass/coordinator (see tests/conftest.py). Fast and dependency-light.
homeassistant==2026.2.3
pytest>=8.0,<10
pytest-asyncio>=0.24,<2
pytest-cov>=5.0
requests>=2.31.0
